name: Nanosonics Limited
analysis: NAN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2750, stop A$3.0789, target A$3.7400 (2.37:1) — then trail it.
